user.title: Add Minecraft Server
user.description:
Set up a new Minecraft server to receive webhook data.

After setup, you'll get a webhook URL to configure in your Minecraft mod.

data_description.server_name: A friendly name for this Minecraft server (e.g., 'Survival', 'Creative', 'SMP')

error.server_exists: A server with this name already exists

init.title: Minecraft Server Configuration
init.description:
**Webhook URL:**
`{webhook_url}`

Configure your Minecraft mod to send POST requests to this URL with JSON data.

**Webhook ID:** `{webhook_id}`
